title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: Responsive personal portfolio showcasing projects, skills, and professional experience with modern UI/UX design.

title: Scientific Calculator Web Application
description: Built a fully responsive scientific calculator using React, optimized for mobile, tablet, and desktop with touch-friendly UI and adaptive layouts.

title: ATM Simulation System
description: Console-Based application allows users to perform basic banking operations such as depositing money, withdrawing funds, and checking account balance through a menu-driven interface

title: Ship Reservation System
description: Developed a full-stack Ship Reservation System using React.js, Spring Boot, and MySQL, allowing users to book ship tickets, manage reservations, and view travel details through a responsive and user-friendly interface.

title: Library Management System
description: Built a Library Management System in Java to streamline book management operations, including adding books, searching records, issuing books, and returning books through a user-friendly console interface.
